---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability for the module
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case, and why does the
current module fall short?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour or input/output you would like. If you can, sketch the
variable or resource change you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you evaluated (other inputs, wrapping the module, doing it
outside the module) and why they are insufficient.

## Additional context

Links, references, or related issues.
